seoTitle: Vasse vs Victoria Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Vasse and Victoria Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Vasse vs Victoria Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Vasse and Victoria Park.
heading: Vasse vs Victoria Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Vasse, Western Australia and Victoria Park, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Victoria Park has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Vasse (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Vasse or Victoria Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Vasse has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Victoria Park scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Vasse scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Victoria Park scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Vasse or Victoria Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Victoria Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
